option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: // moved to backup to avoid conflict with app router implementation

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
// other metadata (keep as object) const extras = { ...job }; return
Job "{jobId}" nicht gefunden (Status {res.status})
; const res = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL}/api/job/${jobId}`, { use client"; import React from "react"; const JobPage = () => { // mock data for layout preview only const job = { id: "demo-job", spp: 1200, targetSpp: 5000, pictureOnly: false, created: new Date().toISOString(), finishedAt: null, cancelled: false, renderTime: 0, sceneDescription: { width: 1920, height: 1080, rayDepth: 8, }, }; return (
{/* Image preview placeholder */} {job.spp > 0 && (
e.preventDefault()}>
)}
Resolution {job.sceneDescription.width} × {job.sceneDescription.height}
Ray depth {job.sceneDescription.rayDepth}
SPP {job.spp.toLocaleString()}/{job.targetSpp.toLocaleString()} ( {Math.round((job.spp / job.targetSpp) * 100)}%)
Created at {new Date(job.created).toLocaleString()}
Finished at n/a
Total time(1) --:--:--
Effective SPS (2) n/a
Render time(3) --:--:--
Average SPS (4) n/a

1 Actual time between job creation and completion.
2 Total samples divided by total time.
3 Sum of render times of all dumps.
4 Total samples divided by render time.

); }; export default JobPage;

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
"use client"; import React from "react"; const JobPage = () => { // mock data for layout preview only const job = { id: "demo-job", spp: 1200, targetSpp: 5000, pictureOnly: false, created: new Date().toISOString(), finishedAt: null, cancelled: false, renderTime: 0, sceneDescription: { width: 1920, height: 1080, rayDepth: 8, }, }; return (
{/* Image preview placeholder */} {job.spp > 0 && (
e.preventDefault()}>
)}
Resolution {job.sceneDescription.width} × {job.sceneDescription.height}
Ray depth {job.sceneDescription.rayDepth}
SPP {job.spp.toLocaleString()}/{job.targetSpp.toLocaleString()} ( {Math.round((job.spp / job.targetSpp) * 100)}%)
Created at {new Date(job.created).toLocaleString()}
Finished at n/a
Total time(1) --:--:--
Effective SPS (2) n/a
Render time(3) --:--:--
Average SPS (4) n/a

1 Actual time between job creation and completion.
2 Total samples divided by total time.
3 Sum of render times of all dumps.
4 Total samples divided by render time.

); }; export default JobPage;

option.name: originalContent

originalContent
